info.title: Linting Orchestrator API
info.description:
The linting orchestrator uses Spectral and custom rule engines.
It provides a REST API for uploading documents, submitting lint jobs, and retrieving results.

**Deployment Modes:**
- **Light Mode** (Embedded): CLI embeds server, zero-config, perfect for CI/CD
- **Standalone Mode**: Independent server process, long-running, multi-user
- **Companion Mode**: Runs alongside the MCP OpenAPI Analyzer for integrated document lifecycle

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints on failure

error.description: Error category (e.g., Not Found, Validation Error, Internal Server Error)

details.description: Additional error details such as validation errors or field-level issues

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred

JobStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a lint job

JobProgress.description: Task-level progress breakdown for a lint job

totalTasks.description: Total number of tasks in the job

completedTasks.description: Number of tasks that completed successfully

failedTasks.description: Number of tasks that failed with errors

timeoutTasks.description: Number of tasks that exceeded the execution timeout

runningTasks.description: Number of tasks currently being executed

queuedTasks.description: Number of tasks waiting in the queue

SourcePosition.description: A position in a text document identified by line and character offset

line.description: Zero-based line number in the source document

character.description: Zero-based character offset within the line

SourceRange.description: Source location range within the document (line and character positions)

LintIssue.description: A single lint issue found in the document

ruleId.description: Unique identifier of the rule that triggered this issue

code.description: Machine-readable issue code from the ruleset

message.example: responses should include at least one error status code (4xx or 5xx)

path.description: JSONPath segments to the location of the issue in the document

suggestions.description: Suggested fixes or improvements for the issue
example: Add a 4xx or 5xx response to this operation

ResultSummary.description: Aggregated issue counts by severity level

totalIssues.description: Total number of issues found across all severity levels

errorCount.description: Number of issues with error severity (must fix)

warningCount.description: Number of issues with warning severity (should fix)

RulesetExecutionResult.description: Execution details for a single ruleset run against a document

executionTime.description: Execution time in milliseconds for this ruleset

success.description: Whether the ruleset execution completed without internal errors

error.description: Error message if the ruleset execution failed internally

issueCount.description: Total number of issues found by this ruleset

issues.description: List of issues found by this ruleset

metadata.description: Execution metadata for this ruleset run

ruleEngine.description: Name of the rule engine that executed the ruleset

cacheHit.description: Whether the result was served from cache

RuleInfo.description: Metadata for a single lint rule within a ruleset

name.description: Unique rule identifier within the ruleset

severity.description: Default severity level of the rule

message.description: Message template shown when the rule is triggered
message.example: Every operation must have a unique operationId

description.description: Detailed explanation of what the rule checks and why
description.example: Ensures every operation has a unique operationId for code generation

recommended.description: Whether this rule is recommended to be enabled

RuleOverrides.description: Map of rule IDs to override severity. Use "off" to exclude a rule, or a severity level to change it.

DocumentSummary.description: Summary metadata for an uploaded document

title.description: Title from the document info section

uploadedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded

HealthResponse.description: Server health status including uptime, configuration, and runtime statistics

timestamp.description: Current server time in ISO 8601 format

uptime.description: Server uptime in seconds since last start

mode.description: Current deployment mode of the server

port.description: Port the server is listening on

host.description: Host address the server is bound to

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the server started

type.description: Type of document store in use

baseDir.description: Relative base directory for document storage

fullPath.description: Absolute resolved path to the document storage directory

stats.description: Orchestrator runtime statistics snapshot (active jobs, worker counts, etc.)

reportService.description: Report Service connection status. Only present when configured.

DocumentUploadRequest.description: Request body for uploading a document

content.description: Raw document content as a JSON or YAML string

format.description: Format of the document content being uploaded

metadata.description: Optional metadata to associate with the uploaded document

DocumentUploadResponse.description: Response after successfully uploading a document

documentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the uploaded document

version.description: Version identifier of the stored document

DocumentListResponse.description: Paginated list of uploaded documents with metadata

total.description: Total number of documents matching the query

limit.description: Maximum number of results returned in this page

offset.description: Number of results skipped for pagination

DocumentResponse.description: Full document object including content and metadata

metadata.description: User-supplied metadata associated with the document

uploadedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded

LintJobSubmitResponse.description: Response returned when a lint job is successfully queued

jobId.description: Unique job identifier for tracking progress and retrieving results

status.description: Initial status of the newly created job

CapacityExceededResponse.description: Response returned when the server cannot accept new jobs due to capacity limits

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the capacity limit
message.example: Server at capacity with 50 active jobs (max 50)

activeJobs.description: Number of currently active (queued or running) jobs

maxJobs.description: Maximum number of concurrent jobs the server allows

retryAfter.description: Suggested number of seconds to wait before retrying

LintJobStatus.description: Current status and progress of a lint job

documentId.description: Identifier of the document being linted

rulesetName.description: Name of the ruleset used for linting

rulesetVersion.description: Version of the ruleset used for linting

startTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job started processing

endTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job finished

LintJobResult.description: Complete results of a finished lint job including all issues and execution metadata

documentId.description: Identifier of the document that was linted

rulesetName.description: Name of the ruleset used for linting

rulesetVersion.description: Version of the ruleset used for linting

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

totalExecutionTime.description: Total execution time of the job in milliseconds

results.description: List of all lint issues found in the document

JobSummary.description: Lightweight summary of a lint job for list views

rulesetName.description: Name of the ruleset used for linting

rulesetVersion.description: Version of the ruleset used for linting

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

ReportGenerationRequest.description: Request body to generate a report from a completed lint job

format.description: Output format for the report. Currently only SARIF is supported.

includeSnippets.description: Include source code snippets in the report for each issue

fingerprintSchemes.description: List of fingerprint scheme names to include for result deduplication

SarifReport.description: SARIF v2.1.0 (Static Analysis Results Interchange Format) report

runs.description: Array of analysis runs. Each lint job produces one run.

items.description: A single SARIF analysis run containing tool info and results

tool.description: Information about the analysis tool and its rules

ruleId.description: Identifier of the rule that produced this result

text.example: responses should include at least one error status code

JobListResponse.description: Paginated list of lightweight job summaries

total.description: Total number of jobs matching the filter criteria

limit.description: Maximum number of results returned in this page

offset.description: Number of results skipped for pagination

hasMore.description: Whether more results are available beyond this page

sessionId.description: Runtime session ID used to filter stale jobs from previous server instances

JobListDetailedResponse.description: Paginated list of jobs with full document metadata attached

jobs.description: Array of detailed job objects including document metadata

items.description: A job summary enriched with document metadata

rulesetName.description: Name of the ruleset used for linting

rulesetVersion.description: Version of the ruleset used for linting

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

document.description: Document metadata from the document store

operationCount.description: Number of operations in the document

total.description: Total number of jobs matching the filter criteria

limit.description: Maximum number of results returned in this page

offset.description: Number of results skipped for pagination

hasMore.description: Whether more results are available beyond this page

sessionId.description: Runtime session ID used to filter stale jobs

CacheInvalidationResponse.description: Response confirming cache invalidation for a document

RulesetSummary.description: Summary metadata for an available ruleset

defaultVersion.description: Default version used when no version is specified

description.description: Brief description of what the ruleset validates
description.example: Validates documents for PubHub publishing readiness

availableVersions.description: List of all available version identifiers for this ruleset

displayName.description: Human-friendly display name for the ruleset

ruleCount.description: Number of rules in the default version of this ruleset

tags.description: Tags for filtering or grouping rulesets

RulesetDetails.description: Detailed information about a ruleset including all individual rules

displayName.description: Human-friendly display name for the ruleset

description.description: Brief description of what the ruleset validates
description.example: Validates documents for PubHub publishing readiness

ruleCount.description: Total number of rules in this ruleset version

releaseDate.description: Release date of this ruleset version

deprecated.description: Whether this ruleset version is deprecated

tags.description: Tags for filtering or grouping rulesets

rules.description: List of all individual rules in this ruleset version

storage.description: Statistics about the lint result storage backend

totalResults.description: Total number of lint results stored

orchestrator.description: Orchestrator runtime statistics including active jobs and worker pool state

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the statistics were collected

get.description: Returns server health status, uptime, configuration, and orchestrator statistics.

post.description: Upload a document for linting. Returns a document ID that can be used to submit lint jobs.

413.description: Document exceeds maximum upload size limit

get.description: List uploaded documents with optional filtering, sorting, and search. When `search` is provided, performs a text search; otherwise returns a paginated list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Text search query across document metadata

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

200.description: List of documents matching the query

get.description: Retrieve an uploaded document by its identifier.

post.description: Submit an document for linting against a specified ruleset. Returns a job ID for tracking progress. The job runs asynchronously.

callbackUrl.description: URL to POST job results to on completion (optional)

ruleOverrides.description: Override rule severities or disable rules. Keys are rule IDs, values are severity levels.

202.description: Job submitted and queued for processing

429.description: Too many requests — server at capacity

get.description: Retrieve the current status and progress of a lint job.
Retrieve the results of a completed lint job. Supports optional pagination and filtering via query parameters. When no query params are provided, returns the full result (backward compatible).

parameters.name: pathPrefix
parameters.description: Filter issues whose path starts with this prefix (dot-separated)

get.description: Get aggregated statistics for a completed lint job, including rule breakdown and top paths. Does not return individual issues — use GET /lint/:jobId/results for that.

post.description: Generate a structured report from a completed lint job. Currently supports SARIF (Static Analysis Results Interchange Format) output.

get.description: Generate Markdown instructions for reproducing a lint job using the native Spectral CLI. Includes git clone, install, and spectral lint commands. When rule overrides were applied, includes Spectral override configuration.
Returns storage statistics and orchestrator metrics.
List lint jobs with optional filtering. Returns lightweight job summaries (document ID only, no metadata).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by job status. Comma-separated for multiple values.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter jobs created after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter jobs created before this date (ISO 8601)

get.description: List lint jobs with full document metadata attached. Heavier than `/lint/jobs` but provides complete context for each job.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by job status. Comma-separated for multiple values.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter jobs created after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter jobs created before this date (ISO 8601)

200.description: Paginated list of jobs with document metadata

delete.description: Remove all cached lint results for a specific document.

get.description: Returns all configured rulesets with metadata and rule counts.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific ruleset, including all individual rules with their severity and descriptions.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Specific version to load. Defaults to the ruleset's default version.

tags.name: Linting
tags.description: Submit lint jobs and retrieve results
